venn "Note-taking app feature overlap"
set notion   "Notion"
set obsidian "Obsidian"
set roam     "Roam Research"

region notion only              : "Databases"
region obsidian only            : "Plugins"
region roam only                : "Block refs"
region notion & obsidian        : "Markdown"
region notion & roam            : "Web clipper"
region obsidian & roam          : "Bi-links"
region notion & obsidian & roam : "Wiki tags"
